title: Puravankara is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Puravankara is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara:
Puravankara is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara!
